parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- SITE summary
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as site_orders,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric/100.0,2) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as site_gmv,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE payment_method ILIKE '%card%')::numeric/100.0,2) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as gmv_card,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE payment_method ILIKE '%card%') FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as cnt_card,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE payment_method NOT ILIKE '%card%')::numeric/100.0,2) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as gmv_balance,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE payment_method NOT ILIKE '%card%') FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as cnt_balance,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('cancelled_before_payment','cancelled_after_payment','cancelled') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as cancelled,

  -- TOP-30 as JSON array
  (SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.rev DESC) FROM (
    SELECT oi.product_snapshot->>'name' as name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as qty,
      ROUND(SUM(oi.total_price)::numeric/100.0,2) as rev
    FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id=o.id
    WHERE o.status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid')
      AND o.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND o.created_at < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 30
  ) t) as top30,

  -- PEAKS as JSON array
  (SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.cnt DESC) FROM (
    SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::int as h, COUNT(*) as cnt
    FROM orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE
      AND status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid')
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
  ) t) as peaks,

  -- YM orders as JSON array
  (SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.rub DESC) FROM (
    SELECT ym_order_id, ROUND(items_total::numeric/100.0,0) as rub, delivery_region as city, status
    FROM yandex_market_orders
    WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE
    ORDER BY items_total DESC LIMIT 10
  ) t) as ym_orders,

  -- YM total
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yandex_market_orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as ym_count,
  (SELECT ROUND(SUM(items_total)::numeric/100.0,0) FROM yandex_market_orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE) as ym_total_rub,

  -- YM geo as JSON array
  (SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.orders DESC) FROM (
    SELECT COALESCE(delivery_region,'Неизвестно') as region, COUNT(*) as orders,
      ROUND(SUM(items_total)::numeric/100.0,0) as total_rub
    FROM yandex_market_orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY orders DESC LIMIT 6
  ) t) as ym_geo
